$comment: c20 (D-CSUBSET-ADJACENT-STRING-CONCAT): adjacent string-literal concatenation, C 5.1.1.2 phase 6. `puts("hel" "lo")` prints the concatenated "hello" (then CRT text-mode \r\n on PE; \n on ELF/Mach-O) and exits 42. Modeled on shipped_include_puts (4 targets, per-target expectedStdout) + decl_string_global (release shippedPipeline arm). A dropped second piece prints "hel"; a mis-sized Array<Char,N> over-reads past the NUL — both flip stdout and fail the harness immediately.
